programme.title: The Boy Who Vanished
programme.desc: A woman's son starts to display strange behavior when he returns a decade after his abduction.

programme.title: Snatched From the Crib
programme.desc: A woman searches for her murdered stepsister's missing baby, risking it all to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Ties That Kill
programme.desc: A teen tries to solve the disappearance of her sister and save her foster family from dark truths.

programme.title: Cellmate Secrets: Chris Watts
programme.desc: Christa Richello is writing a book with Chris Watts and her now-fiancé, Dylan, Chris' cellmate.

programme.desc: A woman's son starts to display strange behavior when he returns a decade after his abduction.

programme.title: Color of Love
programme.desc: An African American widow with two kids fosters children who need a home.

programme.title: Color of Love
programme.desc: An African American widow with two kids fosters children who need a home.

programme.title: Not My Family: The Monique Smith Story
programme.desc: Abused as a child, a woman embarks on a quest to discover her true identity and biological origins.

programme.title: Vanished: Searching for My Sister
programme.desc: Jada gets pulled into a world of drugs and deceit as she tries to find her missing sister, Kayla.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The Kamiyah Mobley Story With Robin Roberts
programme.desc: Kamiyah Mobley is kidnapped at birth in 1998 by a woman she grew up believing was her mother.

programme.title: Sinister Stepsister
programme.desc: A woman attempts to learn the truth about her biological father, who was unaware of her existence.

programme.desc: A woman attempts to learn the truth about her biological father, who was unaware of her existence.

programme.title: Twisted Sister
programme.desc: Strange things start happening when Emily meets a woman who claims to be her half sister.
